stemHtml: What shape and colour typically signify the Landing Direction indicator when displaying the runway direction?

options.a: In the shape of a T and be White or Orange and surrounded by white lights when used at night.
options.b: In the shape of a T and be White or red and surrounded by green lights at night.
options.c: In the shape of a T and be Red or Orange surrounded by white lights at night.
options.d: In the shape of a T and be White or Yellow surrounded by white lights at night.
